title: Thing
description: The most general primitive. Anything that can be named, referenced, governed, or related to anything else is a Thing. All other primitives (Identity, Time, Location, Event, Capability, ...) are specializations of Thing. This mirrors schema.org's root type of the same name.

id.description: Canonical, stable identifier for this thing.

type.description: The primitive or domain type of this thing.

metadata.description: Open key/value bag for domain-specific extension.
